day5_ending_true_1.text: *Teacher Eunsu's hand trembles. The syringe fell to the floor.*

day5_ending_true_5.text: *I passed through the emergency exit. With Yuna. The fire escape behind the old wing. The dawn air is cold. Beyond the school fence — the road is visible.*

day5_ending_true_7.text: ***Seolhwa is standing inside the emergency exit. She can't step outside the door.***

day5_ending_true_12.name: Seolhwa
day5_ending_true_12.text: "I waited 6 cycles. For you to get out."

day5_ending_true_13.name: Seolhwa
day5_ending_true_13.text: "...I ended a year ago. ...But if you get out, that's enough."

day5_ending_true_14.name: Me
day5_ending_true_14.text: "I'll remember you. Lee Seolhwa. Left-handed Lee Seolhwa."

day5_ending_true_15.text: *Seolhwa stopped. Turned around. — She was crying. But she was smiling.*

day5_ending_true_16.name: Seolhwa
day5_ending_true_16.text: "...That's the first time anyone's called my name. After 13 cycles."

day5_ending_true_17.text: *Seolhwa's body turns translucent. Scattering into particles of light.*

day5_ending_true_18.text: *That light — flows toward me. Seeps into my chest. ...It's warm. This isn't a hallucination — it's memory.*

day5_ending_true_19.text: *In an instant, it pours into my head like a waterfall.*

day5_ending_true_20.text: ***The memories of the 7th cycle. The night Seolhwa and I searched for documents in the library. The promise made in front of the locked basement door. The moment we tried to climb the fence together—***

day5_ending_true_21.text: ***And the memories before that. The 1st, the 2nd, the 3rd— twelve lives crash in all at once.***

day5_ending_true_22.text: *I fell to my knees. Wept. Twelve cycles' worth of tears all at once. ...Yuna came over and held me from behind. In the cold dawn air, Yuna's body warmth was the only thing that felt real.*

day5_ending_true_24.text: *Yuna gazed at the brightening sky, at the world beyond the school fence, and whispered softly.*

day5_ending_true_26.text: *A news article. 'Unlicensed Research Facility Discovered at XX High School — Allegations of Illegal Drug Administration and Human Clinical Trials'*

day5_ending_true_27.text: *'Multiple victims report memory disorders... Lead researcher B arrested' '3-year student C, who collected evidence while enrolled, played a decisive role in the exposé'*

day5_ending_true_28.text: *I set down my phone. The window. A new school. A new classroom. A place where no one knows me.*

day5_ending_true_29.text: *I looked at the name tag. My name. ...Not the 13th name, but the first one.*

day5_ending_true_30.text: *...I remember. Everything. The 12 versions of me. Seolhwa. Eunsu. Riin. Sea. Yuna.*

day5_ending_true_31.text: *I picked up the pencil with my left hand. A habit from the 7th cycle. Seolhwa's habit. — My habit.*

day5_ending_true_subtitle.text: Graduation — From the classroom that never graduated, at last.

day5_postcredit_2.text: *A spacious office. Stacks of documents on a desk. Multiple monitors. A school blueprint on the screen.*

day5_postcredit_3.text: "Yes. ...Confirmed. The site will be decommissioned. Asset recovery is complete, and personnel will be reassigned."

day5_postcredit_4.text: "The media is noisy about Subject 13. Per protocol, we'll frame it as an individual's misconduct at the site level. Sever all ties to the foundation."

day5_postcredit_5.text: "...Yes. The selection of the next pilot school is complete."

day5_postcredit_6.text: "Has the staff reassignment proposal been submitted?"

day5_postcredit_7.text: *The monitor screen changes. A photo of a new school. New uniforms. New names. The file title is visible. 'Maladjusted Student Correction Program — Year 2 Implementation Plan.'*

day5_postcredit_8.text: *...A new transfer student's profile appears on screen. The student in the photo is smiling. With a face that knows nothing.*

day5_ending_escape_1.text: *I ran. With Yuna. Escaped the school.*

day5_ending_escape_2.text: *I looked back. No one is following.*

day5_ending_escape_4.name: Yuna
day5_ending_escape_4.text: "...Sunbae, we don't have enough evidence. We have photos on the camera, but the documents..."

day5_ending_escape_6.text: *I walked. The predawn road. Under a streetlight.*

day5_ending_escape_7.text: *...My head is quiet. The memories aren't coming back. Because Seolhwa isn't here. Because I never merged with Seolhwa.*

day5_ending_escape_8.text: *The memories of 12 cycles — remain inside the school.*

day5_ending_escape_11.text: *Yuna bit her lip. Started to say something, then swallowed it.*

day5_ending_escape_12.text: *...I was gripping the bag strap with my left hand. Unconsciously.*

day5_ending_resist_2.name: Me
day5_ending_resist_2.text: "You're a victim too, Teacher. You were used by the board."

day5_ending_resist_4.name: Eunsu
day5_ending_resist_4.text: "No. From the 3rd time on, it was my choice."

day5_ending_resist_6.name: Me
day5_ending_resist_6.text: "Even so. If you stay here, the 14th cycle begins. For someone else."

day5_ending_resist_7.text: *Teacher Eunsu stopped. Seolhwa appeared. Behind Teacher Eunsu.*

day5_ending_resist_9.text: *Teacher Eunsu turned around. She saw Seolhwa.*

day5_ending_resist_11.name: Seolhwa
day5_ending_resist_11.text: "For 6 years, I watched every day. You greeting a new me every time."

day5_ending_resist_12.name: Seolhwa
day5_ending_resist_12.text: "Smiling every time. — Breaking a little more every time."

day5_ending_resist_14.text: *Teacher Eunsu set the syringe on the floor. ...She stood there for a long time.*

day5_ending_resist_15.name: Eunsu
day5_ending_resist_15.text: "...If I go outside, everything I did will come to light."

day5_ending_resist_19.text: *Teacher Eunsu — cried. As if the weight of 12 cycles collapsed at once.*

day5_ending_resist_20.name: Eunsu
day5_ending_resist_20.text: "...How can you take me with you. After what I did to you."

day5_ending_resist_21.name: Me
day5_ending_resist_21.text: "...You should face consequences. But it's better than repeating this."

day5_ending_resist_22.text: *I passed through the emergency exit. With Teacher Eunsu. Seolhwa smiled from inside the door. Light scattered.*

day5_ending_cage_eunsu_3.text: *Teacher smiled. Genuinely. For the first time in 12 cycles — a smile that didn't have to wait.*

day5_ending_cage_eunsu_6.text: *...The classroom. Afternoon sunlight. Teacher Eunsu is giving a lesson. I'm sitting by the window.*

day5_ending_cage_eunsu_7.text: *The same class every day. The same classroom every day. The same smile every day.*

day5_ending_cage_eunsu_8.text: ***Am I happy? ...Am I supposed to be happy?***

day5_ending_cage_eunsu_9.text: *I looked out the window. The road beyond the fence. A car passes.*

day5_ending_cage_eunsu_10.text: *...The door is open. I can leave anytime.*

day5_ending_cage_eunsu_11.text: ***I don't leave. It's not that I can't — I don't.***

day5_ending_cage_sea_3.name: Han Sea
day5_ending_cage_sea_3.text: "This time — I don't have to let you go, right?"

day5_ending_cage_sea_4.text: *I nodded. Sea cried. Tears of relief.*

day5_ending_cage_sea_6.text: *...The student council room. Sea opened a lunchbox. She looks at me and smiles.*

day5_ending_cage_sea_7.text: *...The 13th. No — for Sea, the first. The first time she didn't have to let me go — the only cycle.*

day5_ending_cage_sea_8.text: ***But Yuna is in the basement. And I still hear the voice of a Seolhwa who doesn't exist.***

day5_ending_cage_sea_9.text: ***And my memory — will someday be erased again.***

day5_ending_forget_4.name: Me
day5_ending_forget_4.text: "...If these are all my memories... then those 12 unnamed lines abandoned in that basement are all me."

day5_ending_forget_5.name: Me
day5_ending_forget_5.text: "I can't do it... I can't handle this. It feels like my head is going to explode..."

day5_ending_forget_6.name: Me
day5_ending_forget_6.text: "Please erase me. Make me forget everything."

day5_ending_forget_7.text: *Teacher Eunsu raised the syringe. Her hand is shaking.*

day5_ending_forget_9.text: *The needle entered my arm. Cold. Consciousness fades.*

day5_ending_forget_10.text: *The last thing I saw — Seolhwa. Seolhwa is crying. Her lips move. No sound.*

day5_ending_forget_11.text: *...I can read it. The movement of her lips.*

day5_ending_forget_14.text: *...It's bright. An alarm is ringing. I looked at my phone.*

day5_ending_forget_16.text: *The name is different. I looked in the mirror. ...Who is this? It's me. It is me.*

day5_ending_forget_18.text: *I need to go to school. A new school.*

day5_ending_forget_19.text: *A teacher is standing at the school gate.*

day5_ending_forget_21.name: Eunsu
day5_ending_forget_21.text: "Your teacher will take good care of you."

day5_ending_forget_22.text: *Teacher smiled. Warmly. ...A smile I feel like I've seen somewhere before.*

day5_ending_forget_sea_1.text: *A girl is standing at the school gate. A bright smile. Class representative armband.*

day5_ending_forget_sea_2.name: Han Sea
day5_ending_forget_sea_2.text: "Hi! You're the new transfer student, right? I'll show you around."

day5_ending_forget_sea_3.text: *...This person, I feel like I've seen her somewhere. Where was it? ...I can't remember.*

day5_ending_ghost_1.text: *I can't move. My body is frozen.*

day5_ending_ghost_3.text: *...Seolhwa appeared. Between me and Teacher Eunsu.*

day5_ending_ghost_6.name: Seolhwa
day5_ending_ghost_6.text: "I watched for 6 cycles. You not being able to decide."

day5_ending_ghost_7.name: Seolhwa
day5_ending_ghost_7.text: "This time too. I know. It's a habit."

day5_ending_ghost_9.text: *Seolhwa looked straight at me. A hallucination — yet never this vivid before.*

day5_ending_ghost_11.text: *My body moved. Seolhwa's voice — the memory inside me — moves my body.*

day5_ending_ghost_12.text: *I grabbed Yuna's hand and ran for the emergency exit. Teacher Eunsu shouted from behind but I didn't stop.*

day5_ending_ghost_13.text: *I stepped through the emergency exit. Looked back. Seolhwa is standing inside the door. Smiling.*

day5_ending_ghost_15.text: *Seolhwa disappeared. Like light. Without a sound. At the same time — an alarm went off inside the building. The building erupted in noise. Sirens, footsteps, shouting.*

day5_ending_ghost_16.text: *...Seolhwa is gone. Inside my head too — silence. I escaped the school. Sirens wail behind me.*

day5_ending_ghost_17.text: *...A new place. A new life. The memories didn't return. Because I never fully faced Seolhwa's memory.*

day5_ending_ghost_18.text: *But— sometimes at night. When I look in the mirror. ...I think I see silver-white hair. For just a flash.*

day5_ending_ghost_19.text: *When I pick up a pencil with my left hand. When I turn left in a hallway. When I start to call someone's name and stop.*

day5_ending_ghost_20.text: *...Traces left by Seolhwa. The indelible afterimage of a girl disposed of a year ago.*

day5_ending_ghost_21.text: *My body remembers. Even when memories are erased — the habits formed with her remain.*

day5_ending_ghost_subtitle.text: Afterimage — Traces that cannot be erased.

day5_ending_complicit_1.text: *Teacher Eunsu held out a piece of paper.*

day5_ending_complicit_2.name: Eunsu
day5_ending_complicit_2.text: "If you become the handler for the 14th — your memory will never be erased again."

day5_ending_complicit_3.name: Eunsu
day5_ending_complicit_3.text: "Stay here. By my side. Let's take care of them **together**."

day5_ending_complicit_5.text: *I looked at the paper. 'Project Nevergrad — Assistant Researcher Contract.'*

day5_ending_complicit_6.name: Me
day5_ending_complicit_6.text: "...When the 14th arrives — do I say 'welcome, your teacher will take good care of you' to that child too?"

day5_ending_complicit_8.text: *I placed my hand on the contract.*

day5_ending_complicit_12.text: *The school gate. Morning. A new student walks up. The 14th.*

day5_ending_complicit_13.text: *...Same face. Different hair color. Different name.*

day5_ending_complicit_16.name: Me
day5_ending_complicit_16.text: "Don't worry. There are lots of good people here."

day5_ending_complicit_17.text: ***Behind me, Teacher Eunsu is watching. ...Seolhwa stands at the end of the hallway, looking at me. Crying.***

day5_ending_complicit_subtitle.text: Accomplice — The classroom that never graduates.
